defaults.primary_text:
My name is {Owner}{ and my wife {Name}} and I own {Company}.
We serve {areas} — and we're incredibly honored to be part of these amazing communities.

Our clients tell us they paint their homes because they want it to look fresher, feel healthier, and be a representation of them — instead of what the last homeowner or their builder chose.

Right now is a great time to book — we're currently offering {up to $500 off / 10% off} when you book this month.

Just click or tap 'Get Quote' to get your FREE quote today.
We're looking forward to working with you!
— {Owner Name}, {Company}
defaults.hook_first_150: My name is {Owner} and I own {Company}. We serve {areas} — and we're incredibly honored to be part of these amazing communities.

form.name: All Services Volume — DQ Form (HOM standard)
form.form_type: Meta Instant Form — 'Higher intent' with disqualifying questions
form.why: Qualifying form w/ a timeline disqualifier lifts set-rate vs. a bare instant form (~10% vs ~3% CR in our form study).

pages.name: Intro
pages.detail: Brand image + headline: 'Get your FREE painting estimate.' One-line value prop. 0 questions.

pages.name: Qualifying questions
questions: What service do you need? (Interior / Exterior / Cabinet / Multiple) — multiple choice
When are you looking to start? (ASAP / 1–3 months / 3+ months / Just exploring) — timeline DISQUALIFIER
What's your biggest concern, or what would you most like done? — open text (the verbatim VOC 'concerns' question)

pages.name: Completion
pages.detail: 'We'll reach out shortly to schedule your free estimate.' + button to website/call.

form.confirm_note: Exact question wording is the HOM standard — confirm against the live winning form in Lead Center before publishing.

Handsome and modest painter seeks lovely new clients
The Homes Getting Compliments This Summer All Have One Thing in Common

top_primary_texts.text:
How planners are saving hundreds of dollars off their 2025 exterior painting projects.

Scratch it off the to do list. 2025 is going to be a great year and many homeowners have reached out saying its their year to paint. 

They've decided to reach out now as we're offering an early bird discount when homeowners book their exteriors now. 

But why do we do this discount? Simple - it helps us fill our calendar and continue to give our painters work. 

And if it helps us, if should help you too. 

This is why when you book your 2025 exterior project with us his month, you will save $500 OFF your project. 

Simply click or tap 'Get Quote' Below.

I look forward to serving you and your family.

Brandon, Owner
Alpha Omega Painters

My name is Ismael, and my wife Elizabeth and I own Top Empire Painting. We serve Raleigh, Cary, Apex, and surrounding North Carolina communities  and we’re incredibly honored to work in the homes of the people who make this area so special.

The other day, my marketing guy  asked me:

“Why do people choose you over the other painting companies?”

I thought about it and said:

It really comes down to this:

→  We actually care about the people we work with.
→  We built this business from the ground up with integrity- no shortcuts.

We didn’t inherit a company or start this as a side gig.
Painting was something I chose to master and over time, it became the foundation for a business that could support our family, serve our community, and give back in a meaningful way.

From day one, we’ve built our reputation on:

✅ Respect for your home
✅ A crew that’s clean, professional, and kind
✅ Honest quotes and clear communication
✅ Prep work done right — no rushing, no cutting corners
✅ A job that looks good not just now… but years from now

And when something needs to be made right — we do it. No questions asked.

If you’ve been thinking about painting your home, now’s a great time.

Homeowners who book their estimate early can lock in priority scheduling and even save with our seasonal offers.

Just click or tap ‘Get Quote’ to schedule your free estimate today.

We’d love to learn more about your project and show you what Top Empire Painting is all about.

Ismael & Elizabeth Mejia
Owner, Top Empire Painting
 (919) 825-6179
 www.topempirepainting.com

Proudly serving Raleigh, Cary, Apex, Chapel Hill, and surrounding NC communities

It started with a few rooms in college.
Some side gigs. A couple rolls of tape. One brush.
But that brush turned into a calling  and OVO Painting was born.

I’m Sebastian, and I left the corporate world to start something I believed in:

A company that actually cares about people, process, and results.

We’re not some fly-by-night paint crew. We’re part of a national group of home service pros committed to raising the bar  with integrity, consistency, and craftsmanship that lasts.

Here’s what that means for you:

 ✔️ Complimentary color consultation
 ✔️ A dedicated project manager (yes, an actual human who keeps the job moving)
 ✔️ Meticulous prep and clean workspaces
 ✔️ 10% off when you book your project this month

We specialize in interior, exterior, and cabinet painting — and we treat your home with the kind of respect that’s hard to find these days.

If you’ve been burned before or just want a painting experience that’s stress-free, clean, and built around YOU  we’d love to help.
Click “Get Quote” to start your free estimate.

Sebastian Thomas
 Owner, OVO Painting
 📞 (404) 630-2720 | ovopainting.com
 Proudly serving Atlanta homeowners who expect more than a fresh coat of paint.

Hi. I’m Caio.
I run a painting company called Excellence Custom Painting.
And despite the name, I still trip over ladders, drink way too much coffee, and triple-check my drop cloths.

I’ve been painting since I was 13.
Started with hand-me-down tools in Brazil.

Moved to the U.S., learned American standards, and eventually started this company with my wife, Melanie — and a very enthusiastic French Bulldog named Leo.
Our promise?

No half-done prep. No disappearing crews. No “we’ll fix it later” lies.

We actually:

 ✔️ Mask off your floors
 ✔️ Sand until it’s smooth
 ✔️ Apply finishes that last
 ✔️ Clean up every night
 ✔️ And show up when we say we will

If your last paint job felt like a scam — we’re here to restore your faith.

Tap “Get Quote” to schedule a consultation.
And if you’re just here for the dog pics, that’s okay too.

Caio
Owner, Excellence Custom Painting

I'm Dave. I paint houses. I also need to eat occasionally.
Groundbreaking stuff, I know.

Look, I could tell you that Proper Painters is "a cut above the rest" or that we "exceed expectations," but you've heard that from every painter who bought a Facebook ad this week. 

So let me try something radical: honesty mixed with moderate charm.

Here's what we actually do:

✅ Interior & exterior painting (the classics)
✅ Deck and fence staining (because wood gets sad without it)
✅ Carpentry, board replacement, drywall repairs (we fix things before painting over the evidence)
✅ Free color consultations (so you don't pick a shade you'll hate in 6 months)

Right now, book this month and save $500-$1000* on your project. You also get strong 2-4 year warranties and communication that doesn't leave you wondering if we still exist.

Here's what actual humans have said about us:

"Superb. Hire this company if you need painting done. The project was professionally managed from beginning to end." -Thomas Hockey, Bon Air

"Absolute hands down the best in customer service, great pricing, and excellent painters." -Christina Paczkowski, Chesterfield

Click this ad and you'll fill out a quick form to meet with me. I'll show up with ideas, a quote, and possibly too much enthusiasm. 

You can use these ideas even if you decide I'm not your guy. No hard feelings.

If you ARE suitably impressed, we can discuss the financially prudent decision to hire me and my team of painters who show up on time and don't ghost you midway through the job.

Click 'Get Quote' and let's make your house look less sad.

Fingers crossed,

Dave
Owner at Proper Painters / Mediocre Joke Teller / Surprisingly Good at Color Theory

P.S. If you're not painting right now, tell your friends about me. Preferably using words like "impressive" and "you should hire Dave immediately."

*Discount varies by project size. We're not wizards.
